prompt.goal: Verify TutorProfile; resolve Reports; list AiLogs.
prompt.currentState: - Code da ship tren branch tuong ung; prompt nay chuan hoa theo AI Agent Code Process (MeU). - Engineer dung de review/replay agent neu can re-implement.
prompt.taskUnit: - Implement dung goal va output: AdminController TutorProfiles/Reports/AiLogs, Views
prompt.scope: - Verify TutorProfile; resolve Reports; list AiLogs. - Output: AdminController TutorProfiles/Reports/AiLogs, Views
prompt.hardRules: - Chi Admin - KHONG mo rong sang module khac - KHONG sua appsettings secrets - AntiForgery tren moi POST form - Self-review chi file trong outputRequired
prompt.tasks: 1. Doc FRS + BreakTask + context 2. Tom tat hien trang cho engineer 3. Implement dung scope 4. dotnet build 5. Viet Report theo format M1 (Da lam gi / Ket qua / AC / Test / Rui ro / Buoc tiep)
prompt.constraints: - .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core MVC / EF Core - Bootstrap 5 - Commit message 1 dong: feat(mx): ... - M8-T3
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] Dung FRS/BreakTask cho M8-T3 - [ ] Output files ton tai - [ ] dotnet build pass - [ ] Report day du section M1
prompt.testPlan: 1. dotnet build → pass 2. Smoke test UI/API theo goal task 3. Kiem tra khong regress module truoc
